# Issue Report 🐛 / Feature Request ✨

Please fill out the information below.

---

## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of the bug or the feature you would like to request.

## 🚀 Steps to Reproduce (Bugs Only)

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🖼️ Screenshots (Optional)

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Technical Details

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome]
- **Stack:** [e.g. Frontend/Backend]

## 💡 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem or feature request here.
